name: Coffee Fudge
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 3-quart saucepan, combine sugar, milk, instant coffee, coffee cream, and corn syrup.
2. Bring the mixture to a boil over medium heat.
3. Once boiling, remove from heat and place a candy thermometer in the pan.
4. Cook until the temperature reaches 236 degrees F (112 degrees C).
5. Remove from heat; stir in butter and vanilla extract.
6. Allow the mixture to cool to lukewarm.
7. Stir gently until the candy begins to thicken.
8. Pour into a buttered, greased 8-inch square pan.
9. Melt the chocolate coating over hot water in a double boiler.
10. Spread the melted chocolate evenly over the fudge and sprinkle with chopped nuts.
11. Allow the mixture to cool completely before cutting into squares. Makes about 49 pieces.
